calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-14-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-08-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-11-2012 Continued To Sep-17-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiff'S Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Matters For Which Admissions Were Sought Through Request For Admissions
Off Calendar May-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. (no card) specially appearing for plaintiff and moving party.
Jorge Portillo, Tel. 415.671.5089, defendant appearing on his own behalf.

The matter was argued. The court vacated its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Matters For Which Admissions Were Sought Through Request For Admissions is denied. Defendant was provided with a copy of the requests for admission and is ordered to respond by 5:00 PM on May 23, 2012. Order signed. Pro Tem Judge: Katherine Huibonhoa; Not reported

Mtn For Order Deeming Admitted Matters For Which Admissions Were Sought Through Req For Admissions
Off Calendar May-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF PERSOLVE, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA ACCOUNT RESOLUTION ASSOCIATES' Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Matters For Which Admissions Were Sought Through Req For Admissions.
To be heard at 9:00 am in Department 301 on line 9 of the discovery calendar. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976

Plaintiff'S Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Matters For Which Admissions Were Sought Through Request For Admissions
Off Calendar May-02-2012 Continued To May-22-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appearing specially for the plaintiff and moving party.
No other appearance.

Plaintiff's counsel provided the court with courtesy copies of the moving papers. For good cause shown, the court vacated its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Matters For Which Admissions Were Sought Through Request For Admissions is continued to May 22, 2012 at 9:00 am. Plaintiff to give notice of the new hearing date. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin, not reported.
